ui.title: ExifSense | Photo Analysis & Privacy
ui.hero_desc: You don't need to be an expert to understand the hidden information in your photos. ExifSense makes it easy for anyone to read location, device, and image history—securely and privately.
ui.batch_confirm_msg: You currently have {count} file(s) staged. Would you like to proceed with the analysis now?
ui.removal_modal_desc: Select which information you would like to strip from this image.
ui.dropzone_prompt: Drop your images here or click to browse
ui.advisory_mobile_warn: Mobile Users: Capturing photos directly via browser may result in missing geospatial metadata due to browser privacy sandboxing.
ui.advisory_recommend: To preserve maximum metadata details, we recommend using your device's native camera app first, then selecting the file from your gallery via the "Files" option.
ui.feature_secure_desc: 100% local browser processing. No image assets or EXIF tags are ever transmitted to a server, keeping your data confidential.
ui.feature_spoof_desc: Validates assets at the binary level using Magic Bytes signatures. Detects disguised extensions and rejects malicious files.
ui.feature_integrity_desc: Automatically computes SHA-256/SHA-1 hashes and analyzes metadata for chronological anomalies, tampering, and edit history.
ui.feature_sanitize_desc: Easily strip GPS coordinates, camera details, and personal information from your photos before sharing to protect your privacy.
ui.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to proceed?
ui.history_empty: Your history is empty. Start a new analysis to see items here.
ui.no_exif_desc: This image has been stripped of its metadata or did not contain any to begin with.
ui.no_gps: No GPS signatures found in this asset.
ui.history_delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to permanently purge the record for "{name}"? This action cannot be reversed.
ui.history_clear_confirm_msg: This will permanently remove all analysis sessions from your browser storage. This action cannot be reversed.
ui.reupload_required_msg: Metadata removal requires the original file data. Since you are accessing this from history, please re-upload the original file in the New Analysis tab using the "Remove Metadata" mode.
ui.sanitization_complete_msg: Your image has been cleaned and the download has started.
ui.err_batch_limit: Batch limit exceeded. Please upload a maximum of {n} files at once.
ui.err_invalid_files: Please select valid image files (max 100MB each).
ui.err_invalid_signature: File "{name}" contains an unrecognized format signature or corrupt headers.
ui.warn_extension_mismatch: Format Alert: File "{name}" exhibits a mismatched extension. Restored to actual structure: {detected}.
ui.verify_dropzone_prompt: Drop a signed manifest JSON file here or click to browse
ui.stamp_desc: This unique cryptographic ID is used to sign all forensic manifests exported in this session.
ui.verify_invalid_signature: Signature verification failed! The manifest file has been tampered with or corrupted.
ui.verify_success: Signature verified successfully! The manifest is authentic and untampered.
ui.evidence_verify_prompt: Drop the original image files here to check their integrity against this manifest.
ui.evidence_verify_hint: Drag and drop the files to calculate and match hashes.
ui.manifest_asset_mismatch: Asset tampered: {name} content has been modified!
ui.manifest_asset_missing: Asset missing from drop: {name} was in the manifest but has not been verified.
ui.key_restore_error: Failed to restore identity key. Invalid file.
ui.confirm_regenerate: Are you sure you want to regenerate your identity? Your current key will be replaced.
ui.verify_invalid_manifest: Failed to read manifest file. Ensure it is valid JSON and contains signature.
ui.passphrase_desc_backup: Please enter a passphrase to encrypt your private key backup.
ui.passphrase_desc_restore: Please enter the passphrase to decrypt your private key backup.
ui.sanitize_presets_desc: Select a preset to quickly toggle metadata settings for your sharing needs:
ui.no_device_found: No device manufacturer or model info found

narratives.integrity_clean: This photo retains its original date and location details. No common indicators of external editing tools were found in the basic metadata.
narratives.integrity_edit_software: Recorded Processing Software: The metadata indicates this photo was saved or processed using {software}. Some original camera details may have been modified.
narratives.integrity_future_date: Unusual Capture Time: The recorded capture date ({date}) is in the future compared to the current system time. This is commonly caused by an incorrectly set camera clock, but it also raises the possibility of deliberate date modification.
narratives.integrity_capture_after_file: File Time Difference: The recorded photo capture date ({date}) is newer than the file modification date ({fileDate}). This can be caused by device time zone variations or file transfers between unsynchronized systems, but it may also occur if the camera capture date was intentionally adjusted backward.
narratives.integrity_missing_original: Capture Time Not Found: The original capture time is missing, but processing traces from {indicator} are present. While this typically occurs automatically when a photo is exported, it can also indicate intentional metadata sanitization to remove the original timeline.
narratives.hardware: This photo was taken using an {make} {model} camera{lens}.
narratives.hardware_software: The device was running {software} when taking this photo.
narratives.hardware_analysis: Analysis indicates a standard and expected camera profile for this device type.
narratives.hardware_mod: This photo was taken with a {make} {model}{lens} camera, and subsequently processed or saved via {software}.
narratives.exposure: Captured with an aperture of {aperture}, shutter speed of {shutter}, and sensor sensitivity of {iso}{program}.
narratives.exp_low_light: The high sensor sensitivity (ISO) suggests this photo was taken in a dark place or indoors.
narratives.exp_bright: The low ISO and fast shutter speed indicate a well-lit environment, likely outdoors during daylight.
narratives.exp_shallow_depth: The wide aperture creates a blurry background (bokeh effect) to make the main subject stand out.
narratives.exp_standard: The camera settings indicate a standard, well-balanced lighting environment.
narratives.optics: The lens was set to a focal length of {focal}{focal35}{zoom}. This indicates the level of zoom used when taking the photo.
narratives.equivalent_35mm: (equivalent to {mm}mm on a standard 35mm film camera)
narratives.quality: Image resolution is {width}x{height} pixels. Camera settings indicate a {contrast} contrast level, {sharpness} sharpness level, and {colorSpace} color space.
narratives.timeline_mod_note: Note: A subsequent file modification time was detected ({modStr}). This can occur due to file transfer activity between devices, but it may also indicate that the file was edited or saved again after the original capture.
narratives.timeline_integrity: The timeline of photo capture appears natural and consistent.
narratives.no_chrono: No capture date or time could be found in this file.
narratives.geospatial: Location analysis shows this photo was taken near {locationName} (Coordinates: {lat}, {lng}). The location data appears natural and genuine.
narratives.no_geo: No location data (GPS). This is common if the device's GPS was disabled during capture, but it can also result from intentional removal of location data before sharing.
narratives.combined_hw_consistent: All photos in this group were taken with the same camera model: {device}. This suggests they were taken by the same person or with a single camera.
narratives.combined_hw_discrepancy: Multiple different cameras detected: {deviceList}. This pattern is common when photos are gathered from different people or cameras.
narratives.combined_timeline: All photos were taken within a span of {diffHours} hours, starting from {start} to {end}. The timeline is consistent and contains no chronological overlap.
narratives.combined_geo_concentrated: All photos were taken in a very small area (within a 50-meter radius). This suggests the photographer stood in one spot while taking them.
narratives.combined_geo_localized: Location spread indicates a local area of about {dist} meters, which is typical for walking distances.
narratives.combined_geo_trail: Location spread shows the photographer traveled about {dist} km while taking these photos, likely using a vehicle.
narratives.velocity_warning: Travel Alert: The distance between locations indicates a very high speed of ({speed} km/h). This can occur naturally if photos were taken out of chronological order, if there was a temporary GPS signal delay, or if photos were combined from multiple sources, but it may also indicate manual modification of the time or location data after capture.
narratives.sanitization_alert: Core Metadata Not Found: This photo lacks both device and location data. While this is very common automatically when sending photos via messaging apps (like WhatsApp/Telegram) for efficiency and privacy, it can also be the result of intentional metadata sanitization by the user.
narratives.null_island_warn: Zero Coordinates (0,0): The location points to the coordinates (0,0). This commonly happens when the camera's GPS sensor has not fully locked a satellite signal before shooting, but it can also indicate that the location data has been intentionally cleared or removed.
narratives.precision_warn: Simplified Coordinate Format: The GPS coordinates are represented by simple rounded numbers without the typical random decimal precision recorded by native GPS sensors. While this can happen due to data simplification by third-party apps or manual entry in a gallery, it may also indicate the intentional use of location-mocking tools.
narratives.combined_serial_match: Physical Camera Verified: All photos in this batch were taken using the exact same physical camera unit (Serial Number: {serial}).
narratives.combined_hw_sparse_single: Only {count} of {total} photos contain camera info ({device}). The rest do not.
narratives.combined_hw_sparse_consistent: {count} of {total} photos share the same camera: {device}. The rest lack camera information.
narratives.combined_hw_sparse_discrepancy: Different camera models detected among photos containing data: {deviceList}. The remaining {missing} photos lack camera metadata.
narratives.combined_timeline_sparse: Time analysis is limited because only 1 of {total} photos has a capture timestamp.
narratives.combined_timeline_sparse_note: Timeline built using the {count} photos containing time data.
narratives.combined_geo_sparse: Location analysis is limited because only 1 of {total} photos has GPS coordinates.
narratives.combined_geo_sparse_note: Distance calculation based on the {count} photos containing location data.
narratives.combined_integrity_warning: Group Consistency Note: The photos in this group have varying levels of metadata completeness.
narratives.combined_integrity_stripped_all: A total of {count} out of {total} photos lack camera, time, and location data. This commonly happens automatically to photos downloaded from the internet or social media, but it may also be caused by intentional data clearing before the files were collected.
narratives.combined_integrity_stripped_part: A total of {count} out of {total} photos are missing certain data categories (like GPS or camera info). This can be caused by differing device permission settings during capture, but it also raises the possibility of selective data removal.
narratives.combined_integrity_mix: Mixed Completeness Status: Out of {total} photos, {fully} are without metadata details, {partially} are missing some details, and only {clean} retain complete information.
narratives.combined_integrity_clean: Maximum Original Data: All {total} photos retain complete metadata (Camera, Time, and Location info).
narratives.no_data_narrative: Analysis unavailable because this photo lacks the required metadata for this category.
narratives.no_metadata_tags: No standard data tags were found in this category.
narratives.empty_geospatial: Cannot map location because this photo does not have embedded GPS coordinates.
narratives.empty_hardware: Camera brand and model cannot be determined because the device manufacturer data (Make/Model tags) was deleted.
narratives.empty_exposure: Camera exposure details (Aperture, ISO, Shutter speed) were not found on this photo.
narratives.empty_optics: Lens zoom information cannot be determined because this photo does not have focal length data.
narratives.empty_quality: Image quality is analyzed using general estimates because the main pixel dimension data is missing.
narratives.empty_timeline: Time analysis failed because the original capture date and time were not saved.
narratives.empty_all: Metadata Fully Cleaned: No camera, time, or location info was found in this photo.
narratives.geo_reconstruct_note: *Estimated distance based on the most probable road routes between the photos' locations.
